# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User File Upload
Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents
Version: 1.0
*/

// Prevent direct access
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class UserFileUpload {
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'enqueue_scripts'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_upload_user_file', array($this, 'handle_file_upload'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_upload_user_file', array($this, 'handle_file_upload'));
    }
    
    public function enqueue_scripts() {
        wp_enqueue_script('jquery');
        wp_enqueue_script('user-file-upload', plugin_dir_url(__FILE__) . 'js/upload.js', array('jquery'), '1.0', true);
        wp_localize_script('user-file-upload', 'ajax_object', array('ajax_url' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php')));
    }
    
    public function handle_file_upload() {
        if (!isset($_POST['security']) || !wp_verify_nonce($_POST['security'], 'user_file_upload_nonce')) {
            wp_die('Security check failed');
        }
        
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_die('Please log in to upload files');
        }
        
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $user_dir = $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/user-files/';
        
        if (!file_exists($user_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($user_dir);
        }
        
        if (isset($_FILES['user_file'])) {
            $file = $_FILES['user_file'];
            
            $allowed_types = array(
                'image/jpeg',
                'image/jpg',
                'image/png',
                'image/gif',
                'application/pdf',
                'application/msword',
                'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
                'application/vnd.ms-excel',
                'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet'
            );
            
            $file_type = mime_content_type($file['tmp_name']);
            
            if (!in_array($file_type, $allowed_types)) {
                wp_send_json_error('Invalid file type');
            }
            
            $file_name = sanitize_file_name($file['name']);
            $file_path = $user_dir . $file_name;
            
            if (move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $file_path)) {
                $file_url = $upload_dir['baseurl'] . '/user-files/' . $file_name;
                wp_send_json_success(array('url' => $file_url, 'name' => $file_name));
            } else {
                wp_send_json_error('Failed to upload file');
            }
        }
        
        wp_send_json_error('No file uploaded');
    }
}

new UserFileUpload();

// Add shortcode for upload form
function user_file_upload_form() {
    if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
        return 'Please log in to upload files';
    }
    
    $nonce = wp_create_nonce('user_file_upload_nonce');
    
    ob_start();
    ?>
    <form id="user-file-upload-form" enctype="multipart/form-data">
        <input type="file" name="user_file" id="user_file" required>
        <input type="hidden" name="security" value="<?php echo $nonce; ?>">
        <input type="submit" value="Upload File">
    </form>
    <div id="upload-result"></div>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}
add_shortcode('user_file_upload', 'user_file_upload_form');

// Add admin menu
function add_user_file_menu() {
    add_management_page(
        'User Files',
        'User Files',
        'manage_options',
        'user-files',
        'user_files_page'
    );
}
add_action('admin_menu', 'add_user_file_menu');

function user_files_page() {
    $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
    $user_dir = $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/user-files/';
    
    if (file_exists($user_dir)) {
        $files = glob($user_dir . '*');
        echo '<h2>User Uploaded Files</h2>';
        echo '<table class="wp-list-table widefat fixed striped">';
        echo '<thead><tr><th>File Name</th><th>Size</th><th>Upload Date</th></tr></thead>';
        echo '<tbody>';
        
        foreach ($files as $file) {
            $file_name = basename($file);
            $file_size = filesize($file);
            $file_date = date('Y-m-d H:i:s', filemtime($file));
            echo '<tr>';
            echo '<td>' . $file_name . '</td>';
            echo '<td>' . size_format($file_size) . '</td>';
            echo '<td>' . $file_date . '</td>';
            echo '</tr>';
        }
        
        echo '</tbody></table>';
    } else {
        echo '<p>No files uploaded yet.</p>';
    }
}
?>
